title: World War II Tracker Update — Apr 19, 2026
summary: Five new commemoration events added spanning April 10–19, 2026: the 84th Day of Valor (Bataan Death March), the 81st anniversary of Buchenwald's liberation, Yom HaShoah 2026 at Yad Vashem with the 38th March of the Living, the 81st anniversary of the Soviet Berlin Offensive, and the 83rd anniversary of the Warsaw Ghetto Uprising. The timeline was also updated with a new entry for the Warsaw Ghetto Uprising (April 19, 1943) — the largest armed Jewish resistance action of the Holocaust, led by Mordechai Anielewicz — which had been absent from the historical record.

title: World War II Tracker Update — Thu Apr 16, 2026
summary: 81st Anniversary: Soviet Berlin Offensive Launched April 16, 1945.

title: World War II Tracker Update — Mon Apr 13, 2026
summary: Israel and Jewish communities worldwide observed Yom HaShoah (Holocaust Martyrs' and Heroes' Remembrance Day) with the State Opening Ceremony at Yad Vashem in Jerusalem.

title: World War II Tracker Update — Sat Apr 11, 2026
summary: Germany and international observers commemorated the 81st anniversary of the liberation of Buchenwald concentration camp by US Army forces on April 11, 1945.

title: World War II Tracker Update — Fri Apr 10, 2026
summary: The Philippines and US military communities observed the 84th anniversary of the fall of Bataan (April 9, 1942) and the Bataan Death March.
